overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a video game depicting a white-haired character walking through a foggy medieval village at night. The scene features traditional wooden log cabins with warm candlelight glowing from windows, creating a moody, atmospheric environment with muted blue-green tones.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow path between wooden village houses

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the foggy village, passing a wooden cart on the left side

wooden cabin with warm light glowing from windows
tall bare tree silhouetted against the foggy night sky
simple wooden cart or wheelbarrow sitting in the grass

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a foggy medieval village at night, passing between traditional wooden log cabins. A wooden cart sits on the left side of the path, while warm light glows from the windows of the cabins. The atmosphere is quiet and moody with limited visibility due to the night fog.

agents.ego_description: continuing down the village path toward a distant light source visible ahead

entered.detail: warm orange light source visible in the distance between the houses

segments.scene_description: The character proceeds deeper into the village, leaving the wooden cart behind. The path continues between the log cabins, with the left cabin receding into the distance while a distant lantern light becomes visible ahead, suggesting another figure or building further down the thoroughfare.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a foggy medieval village at night, transitioning from a close-up view of rustic dwellings toward a distant, mysterious light. It begins with the character walking between traditional wooden log cabins, passing a stationary wooden cart on the left while warm candlelight glows from nearby windows. As the character proceeds deeper into the village, the cart recedes and the surrounding cabins shift in perspective, maintaining a quiet and moody atmosphere with limited visibility. The scene then opens up along the thoroughfare, where the dense night fog begins to reveal a flickering lantern light in the distance, drawing the camera further into the village.
